cellar.note: Small home collection. Mostly Spanish reds for dinner and crisp whites for the heat. Not an investment, just what I like to drink and share.

bottle.label: Rioja Reserva
bottle.note: The house pour. Leather and cherry, easy with ropa vieja.

bottle.label: Rioja Gran Reserva
bottle.note: Saved for the occasion that earns it. One opened on Camila's birthday.

bottle.label: Ribera del Duero Crianza
bottle.note: Darker fruit than the Rioja. For when we want something serious.

bottle.label: Ribera del Duero Roble
bottle.note: Smooth weeknight red, would buy again.

bottle.label: Albarino, estate
bottle.note: Crisp and citrus, the summer socializing white. Buy more before guests.

bottle.label: Cava Brut
bottle.note: For toasts and Nochebuena. Sparkling cider stands in for the kids.

bottle.label: Dry Sherry
bottle.note: An aperitif with olives and almonds before a long dinner.
